revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-6-480

Alternative term: Anchor bolt

Steel or other metal bar or bolt projecting from, and securely fixed in, a masonry or concrete structure enabling a superimposed structure or machinery to be fixed in place.

{{IALAFooter}}
